expr2v2b_focus_s0025_f1e3_g16.description: Expr2 V2 Phase B focused: scale=0.025, 1q/2q=1/10, f=1e3 Hz, g=1.6. High-gain Phase A point with positive multi-seed signal.

expr2v2b_focus_s0025_f1e4_g10.description: Expr2 V2 Phase B focused: scale=0.025, 1q/2q=1/10, f=1e4 Hz, g=1.0. Strong and comparatively stable Phase A point.

expr2v2b_focus_s002_f1e2_g04.description: Expr2 V2 Phase B focused: scale=0.02, 1q/2q=1/10, f=1e2 Hz, g=0.4. Strongest Phase A point under full stronger-train settings.

expr2v2b_focus_s002_f1e3_g04.description: Expr2 V2 Phase B focused: scale=0.02, 1q/2q=1/10, f=1e3 Hz, g=0.4. Included to test whether the low-scale g=0.4 lane remains strong at higher evidence.
